title: Hearts contact police and condemn ‘shameful’ abuse of players and staff after Celtic defeat

title: Timmy the whale confirmed dead by Danish authorities
description: Humpback had been found deceased on Friday after rescue attempt criticised as ‘pure animal cruelty’
content:
Timmy the whale has been confirmed dead by Danish authorities two weeks after the beached humpback was transported to the North Sea in a rescue attempt criticised as “pure animal cruelty”.

title: Ebola may have been spreading undetected for three weeks as death toll climbs to 88
description: The virus circulating in the Democratic Republic of Congo has been identified as the rare Bundibugyo strain, which has no vaccine
content:
A burgeoning new Ebola outbreak may have already been spreading for more than three weeks and poses a high risk to nearby African countries, experts say.
